description: The Baxter Street Dudes was a New York City teenage street gang active in the 1870s, consisting of former newsboys and bootblacks. Founded by Baby-Face Willie, they operated the Grand Duke's Theatre from a basement on Baxter Street, which became their headquarters and a popular underworld hangout. The gang wrote and performed plays, musicals, and variety shows, and engaged in tax evasion, thievery, and charity.
